# Scan to Baby

> Scan to Baby is a UK AI image-enhancement studio. You send the 3D baby scan you already have, and we refine it with AI imaging plus a trained human review into a clear, detailed keepsake image of your baby's face, delivered digitally or printed and framed.

## What we do
- We take your existing 3D baby scan and enhance it, sharpening the depth, contours and soft features into a detailed keepsake.
- We are not a medical or diagnostic service, and the result is not a prediction of the baby's real appearance.

## Products and pricing (GBP)
- 3D Scan Enhancement, Digital: £9.99
- 3D Scan Enhancement, Printed and Framed (free UK delivery, digital copy included): £19.99
- Future Baby Pic (a playful AI projection, for fun not a forecast): £14.99
- The Bundle, all three: £29.99

## Key facts
- Delivery: digital image within 24 hours of us receiving your scan; framed prints within 3 to 5 working days.
- Guarantee: 100% money-back if you are not happy.
- Privacy: your scan is never shared and can be deleted on request.
- Serves: United Kingdom. Currency: GBP.

## Links
- Home and ordering: https://scan-to-baby.vercel.app/
- Machine-readable pricing: https://scan-to-baby.vercel.app/pricing.md
